title: senna hebecarpa
intro: Senna hebecarpa, also known as American senna, is a perennial shrub native to the United States, belonging to the Fabaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include acting as a laxative due to the presence of anthraquinone glycosides, particularly sensosides. The health benefits of Senna hebecarpa include relief from constipation, irritable bowel syndrome, and other digestive issues. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal teas, tinctures, or capsules, with recommended dosages typically guided by a healthcare professional.
